target:
(I've been lying on the floor this whole time.
I gave the bed to this guy…)
(The tide is sleeping in my bed in a swimsuit)

(Too distracted by that situation
to even get any sleep…)

(This guy can sleep so normally…
…after saying something like that last night)

"Are you going to complain about being a friend of someone you like?!"
…that…

(…saying she likes me…
…is she actually serious…?)

(Such things have never been said to me
by the human version of the tide…?)

(But if he's a perfect human copy
and even copied the feelings…
…then truly, the tide…)

Ah…there's toast bread, I'll make it,
and bring the leftover curry too.

If it's bread, it'll be easier to eat,
even with one hand…

Wait a second.
Don't leave the room.

Good morning, Shin-chan. Early as usual…
What's wrong?

I-I'm already up, okay.
You don't need to come in to wake me up!!

(At 7:30 on the first loop's morning,
Mio came to wake me up)

(I need to say it clearly,
or she might come into the room again)
The necklace my sister had on last.
(Oh, so the one she's wearing now is a copy…)

I think it'd make your sister happier
if you had it…
Does that make you remember anything?
You know, things before you died…

(Actually, I know it's cruel
to make her remember the day she died…)

(But if his memories return…
there might be some clue about the shadow)

The day after she gave me this shell…
Shinpei, you wet the bed!

That's not something to remember.
Any other memories?

I see…
Well, try to think about it a bit.

I'm going out.
Leave the dishes there after you finish.

The shop's opening today.
So I need to help out.

I see…
You're like your dad…I want to see him…
(I want to let you meet him…)

I'll be back by 2.
I don't think anyone will come here,
so stay put, okay?
